category_sources: Official GNU Texinfo page describes Texinfo as the GNU documentation format and a system that produces multiple output formats from one source.
source_facts.description says Texinfo is the official documentation format of the GNU project.
display_name_sources: Official GNU project page title is GNU Texinfo.
docs_sources: Official GNU Texinfo page links the current Texinfo manual.
source_facts.homepage is the official GNU Texinfo project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official GNU Texinfo page, which links the development source tree hosted on Savannah.
tags_sources: Official GNU Texinfo page describes producing HTML, PDF, DVI, Info, DocBook, LaTeX, and EPUB output.
source_facts.description identifies Texinfo as the GNU documentation format.
source_facts.executables include info, makeinfo, texi2any, texi2dvi, and texi2pdf.
